articles.title_en: PM Modi visits Assam tea garden, plucks leaves, takes selfies with workers; see pics
summary_points: PM Modi visits Assam tea garden
Plucks leaves and takes selfies with workers
See pics
articles.article_en: PM Modi visited an Assam tea garden, where he plucked leaves and took selfies with the workers. The Prime Minister's visit to the tea garden was a surprise one, and it has been widely covered in the media. The pictures of PM Modi plucking tea leaves and taking selfies with the workers have been shared on social media, and they have gone viral.
timeline: PM Modi visits Assam tea garden
Visit goes viral on social media

articles.title_en: Autorickshaw Driver Brutally Assaults 4-Year-Old Boy
summary_points: Autorickshaw driver assaults 4-year-old boy
Boy critically injured
Driver arrested
articles.article_en: An autorickshaw driver in Palghar brutally assaulted a four-year-old boy, slamming him to the ground and smashing his head against an iron rod after an argument with the child's father. The critically injured boy is battling for life in the hospital, and the accused has been arrested.

articles.title_en: Tamil Nadu CM MK Stalin urges voters to defeat AIADMK-BJP alliance
summary_points: Urges voters to defeat AIADMK-BJP alliance
Accuses AIADMK-BJP of betraying minorities and Sri Lankan Tamils
Warns of dire consequences if NDA comes to power
Emphasizes need to preserve Tamil Nadu's identity
articles.article_en: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister MK Stalin urged voters to defeat the AIADMK-BJP alliance, accusing them of betraying minorities and Sri Lankan Tamils by supporting the CAA. He questioned AIADMK's leadership in the alliance and warned of dire consequences if the NDA comes to power, emphasizing the need to preserve Tamil Nadu's identity.

articles.title_en: The government has limited the rise in jet fuel prices for domestic airlines to 25 percent
summary_points: Eases financial burden on airlines and air travelers
International routes face full price increase
Non-scheduled operators experience surge in jet fuel costs
articles.article_en: The government has limited the rise in jet fuel prices for domestic airlines to 25 percent. This decision aims to ease the financial burden on airlines and air travelers. International routes will face the full price increase. Meanwhile, non-scheduled operators are experiencing a more than double surge in jet fuel costs.

articles.title_en: Oracle layoffs: Company sets this severance condition for laid-off employees
summary_points: Oracle has started its largest-ever layoffs, impacting thousands globally. Emplo
yees must sign termination documents via DocuSign to receive severance, which ap
pears less generous than competitors.  These cuts, potentially reaching 30,000,
articles.article_en: Oracle has started its largest-ever layoffs, impacting thousands globally. Employees must sign termination documents via DocuSign to receive severance, which appears less generous than competitors.  These cuts, potentially reaching 30,000, aim to fund a massive AI data center expansion, a move that has placed the company under significant financial strain.

articles.title_en: string
summary_points: Adam Zampa named Player of the Match
2/11 spell in Karachi Kings' PSL victory
Explained decision to choose PSL over IPL
articles.article_en: Adam Zampa was named Player of the Match for his stellar 2/11 spell in Karachi Kings' PSL victory. He explained his decision to choose the PSL over the IPL, citing a lack of IPL interest and the perceived value of his skill set relative to the tournament's commitment. Zampa is enjoying his time in the PSL.

articles.title_en: GST collections rise 8.2% in March 2026 to hit Rs 1.78 lakh crore
summary_points: Domestic GST revenue reached Rs 1.46 lakh crore, registering a growth of 5.9%, w
hile revenue from imports was recorded at Rs 0.54 lakh crore, rising sharply by
17.8% during the period.
articles.article_en: Domestic GST revenue reached Rs 1.46 lakh crore, registering a growth of 5.9%, while revenue from imports was recorded at Rs 0.54 lakh crore, rising sharply by 17.8% during the period.

articles.title_en: Oracle Initiates Global Layoffs
summary_points: Widespread layoffs across the globe
US, India, and other regions affected
Termination emails sent by leadership
articles.article_en: Oracle has initiated a global layoff of employees in the US, India, and other regions. The move is reportedly to fund the company's ambitious AI infrastructure expansion, which is debt-financed. Affected teams have seen significant reductions, with thousands of jobs potentially impacted. The termination emails cited organizational changes as the reason for the layoffs.
timeline: Termination emails sent to affected employees

articles.title_en: Rupee at 100? Currency may weaken further against dollar as oil rises, Middle East conflict persists
summary_points: Even prior to the conflict, the rupee was facing downward pressure due to wideni
ng external imbalances and persistent capital outflows. The surge in oil prices
has intensified these challenges for the world’s third-largest crude importer.
articles.article_en: Even prior to the conflict, the rupee was facing downward pressure due to widening external imbalances and persistent capital outflows. The surge in oil prices has intensified these challenges for the world’s third-largest crude importer.

articles.title_en: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' BO Day 13: Ranveer Singh-starrer crosses Rs 900 crore India net
summary_points: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' starring Ranveer Singh is on a record-breaking spree,
nearing Rs 900 crore net in India and aiming for Rs 1,000 crore. The film earned
an estimated Rs 27.75 crore on its second Tuesday. Despite a gradual decline, i
articles.article_en: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' starring Ranveer Singh is on a record-breaking spree, nearing Rs 900 crore net in India and aiming for Rs 1,000 crore. The film earned an estimated Rs 27.75 crore on its second Tuesday. Despite a gradual decline, its first-week collection was Rs 674.17 crore, with the second week at Rs 225.75 crore.

articles.title_en: AI Firm Anthropic Suffers Source Code Leak
summary_points: AI source code leak
Claude Code agent
unreleased features
IPO
articles.article_en: AI firm Anthropic suffered a significant source code leak of its Claude Code agent, exposing unreleased features like an always-on AI and a pet system. This marks the third such incident for the company, which is reportedly preparing for a massive $380 billion IPO. The leak offers a rare glimpse into the company's development practices.
timeline: AI firm Anthropic suffers source code leak

articles.title_en: Celebrity chef's journey to Padma Shri Award
summary_points: Denied wearing chef coat
Insisted on wearing uniform
Received award in chef coat
articles.article_en: Celebrity chef Sanjeev Kapoor was initially denied wearing his chef coat for the Padma Shri Award ceremony in 2017, being asked to wear traditional Indian attire instead. He insisted on wearing his uniform, which he considers a symbol of pride for the chef community. Ultimately, he received the award in his chef coat, setting a precedent.

articles.title_en: Israel targets Iran factory, alleges fentanyl use in chemical weapons; Tehran denies
summary_points: Israel claims it struck an Iranian pharmaceutical facility, alleging it supplied
fentanyl for a chemical weapons program. Iran confirmed the strike on the Tofig
h Daru factory, asserting it produces only hospital drugs. Both nations reported
articles.article_en: Israel claims it struck an Iranian pharmaceutical facility, alleging it supplied fentanyl for a chemical weapons program. Iran confirmed the strike on the Tofigh Daru factory, asserting it produces only hospital drugs. Both nations reported the incident occurred on Tuesday.

articles.title_en: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi reveals what fueled his 15-ball fifty vs CSK
summary_points: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continued his sensational IPL form, smashi
ng a 15-ball half-century against Chennai Super Kings. This remarkable feat, ach
ieved after eating a sweet, set up Rajasthan Royals' dominant win. Former India
articles.article_en: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continued his sensational IPL form, smashing a 15-ball half-century against Chennai Super Kings. This remarkable feat, achieved after eating a sweet, set up Rajasthan Royals' dominant win. Former India spinner Ravichandran Ashwin lauded the young talent but urged patience for his senior India debut.

articles.title_en: string
summary_points: The UAE is reportedly considering military intervention against Iran
Repeated Iranian attacks and the disruption of the vital Strait of Hormuz have pushed Abu Dhabi to explore options
This move carries substantial risks of further retaliation.
articles.article_en: The UAE is reportedly considering military intervention against Iran, a significant shift from its previous neutral stance. Repeated Iranian attacks and the disruption of the vital Strait of Hormuz have pushed Abu Dhabi to explore options, including supporting US-led efforts to reopen the oil route. This move carries substantial risks of further retaliation.

articles.title_en: Assam's re-contesting MLAs see significant surge in declared wealth
articles.article_en: Assam's re-contesting MLAs have seen a significant surge in their declared wealth, with average assets jumping 80% from Rs 4.17 crore in 2021 to Rs 7.52 crore by 2026. This substantial increase highlights a notable shift in the financial standing of legislators across various parties as they seek re-election.

articles.title_en: Techie Couple Dies by Suicide in Bengaluru Amid Job Loss and Anxiety
summary_points: couple died by suicide
job loss
mounting anxiety
Bengaluru
interfaith marriage
articles.article_en: A techie couple died by suicide in Bengaluru within minutes of each other, reportedly due to job loss and mounting anxiety. The husband was found dead in a locked bedroom, and his wife jumped from the 18th floor shortly after. The couple had moved to Bengaluru to keep their interfaith marriage private.
timeline: both deaths within minutes of each other

articles.title_en: IPL 2026: Why has BCCI punished Punjab Kings skipper Shreyas Iyer?
summary_points: Punjab Kings skipper Shreyas Iyer faced a Rs 12 lakh fine for a slow over-rate i
n their IPL 2026 opener against Gujarat Titans. Despite the disciplinary action,
the team secured a thrilling three-wicket victory, thanks to a stellar 72-run d
articles.article_en: Punjab Kings skipper Shreyas Iyer faced a Rs 12 lakh fine for a slow over-rate in their IPL 2026 opener against Gujarat Titans. Despite the disciplinary action, the team secured a thrilling three-wicket victory, thanks to a stellar 72-run debut from Cooper Connolly, who steered them home in a tense chase.

articles.title_en: 96-year-old Kerala woman excels in literacy program
summary_points: Defied age and illiteracy
Scored 98% in first-ever exam
Excelled in reading, writing, and math
articles.article_en: A 96-year-old Kerala woman, Karthyayani Amma, defied age and illiteracy by enrolling in a literacy program. She astonishingly scored 98% in her first-ever exam, excelling in reading, writing, and math. Her remarkable achievement, born from a personal desire to learn, inspired a nation and earned her prestigious awards, proving education knows no age limit.

articles.title_en: Jet fuel prices rise 8.5% in April, relief for airlines and travelers
summary_points: Jet fuel prices rise 8.5% in April
Relief for airlines and travelers
Ultra-rich impacted by price hike
articles.article_en: Jet fuel prices for scheduled Indian carriers have risen by approximately 8.5% in April, a move that offers relief to airlines and averts significant airfare hikes for average travelers. However, prices for non-scheduled and charter flights have more than doubled, impacting the ultra-rich.
